important_projects.title: Personal Cognitive System
important_projects.description: A local-first personal cognitive advisor intended to help the user clarify problems, understand themselves, and improve thinking quality over time.
evidence: Project Genesis and Constitution created during initial planning.

privacy_preferences.content: The system should be local-first. Sensitive financial, asset, account, legal, medical, family, relationship, and non-public project information should not be uploaded by default.
evidence: User explicitly preferred local-first and said property-related information should not be uploaded.

notes: This file is a manually maintained local profile draft.
Do not write major new memory here without user confirmation.
Prefer behavioral patterns over personality labels.
